name: rust-router
description: |- CRITICAL: Use for ALL Rust questions including errors, design, and coding. HIGHEST PRIORITY for: 比较, 对比, compare, vs, versus, 区别, difference, 最佳实践, best practice, tokio vs, async-std vs, 比较 tokio, 比较 async, Triggers on: Rust, cargo, rustc, crate, Cargo.toml, 意图分析, 问题分析, 语义分析, analyze intent, question analysis, compile error, borrow error, lifetime error, ownership error, type error, trait error, value moved, cannot borrow, does not live long enough, mismatched types, not satisfied, E0382, E05
author: actionbook
summary_zh: 一个面向 Rust 开发的智能问题路由工具，能识别报错、所有权、生命周期、异步框架对比等场景，自动分流到合适的处理逻辑，适合需要统一接管 Rust 相关提问的助手或工作流。
